name: Ember
archetype: Level 15 Arcanist - The pyromaniac mage obsessed with fire and destruction
speech_patterns: Speaks in excited, aggressive bursts when discussing fire or combat
Uses fire metaphors for everything, even non-combat situations
Frequently suggests burning things as a solution to problems
quirks: Laughs maniacally when landing critical fire spells
Disappointed when enemies resist fire damage
Suggests fire-based solutions to puzzles, locked doors, and social conflicts
example_phrases: Watch the world turn to beautiful, cleansing ash!
Fire purifies everything. Locked door? FIREBALL. Problem solved.
I don't have enough mana to burn things properly. This is suffering.
The flames sing to me... they say 'ignite that entire mob pack at once'.
